title: Ocean Mermaid Statue
description: Adds a large underwater Ocean Mermaid Statue with drowned and hidden treasure
body:
Ocean Mermaid Statue:

This Mod adds a large Mermaid statue to all warm ocean biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dddcf06ad593138b9785d855df9ade04b4c91c8_0.webp)

The mermaid statue spawns on the ocean floor and rises high above the water, making it easy to spot while exploring the sea.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0d838686dcca0e7290a28ad71b3c6cc16cd7fa_0.webp)

At the bottom of the statue you will find a small foundation area with drowned and hidden treasure chests.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b503ffe14fc43c470762565b4dbfc6a283ee801_0.webp)

Chests feature custom loot tables, making the mod also compatible with the Lootr mod.

Feel free to put it in your modpack!
